summary: Frontend-only testing completed for SportWissen authentication system. All 13 test features passed successfully. Auth flows (login, logout, register toggle), protected routes, admin access control, and app-level permissions all work correctly.
passed_tests: Portal page renders with 3 app cards (Kugelstoßen, Speakly-App, PlanEd)
Login page renders with email/password fields and submit button
Toggle between login and register mode works
Login as admin (admin@sport-wissen.com) succeeds and redirects to portal
After admin login: portal shows username, admin badge/button (Verwaltung), and logout button
Admin can access /admin/users page and see user list
Admin can see activate/deactivate buttons and app access toggles
Student can access /home (Kugelstoßen app) since they have kugelstoessen access
Student cannot access /admin/users (correctly redirects to portal)
Logout clears user state and shows login button on portal
Unauthenticated user trying to access /home redirects to /login
Registration form shows name field and info text about admin approval
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth features working correctly. Admin user management page accessible at /admin/users. Student user (Max Mustermann / schueler@test.de) has kugelstoessen access. Test User (test@test.com) is blocked. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.
design_review_notes: Dark theme (zinc-950) with good contrast. App cards with colored icons (amber/blue/emerald). Footer with copyright and Emergent badge visible. Proper spacing and padding throughout.
